calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Rang for Nili Raviv.

Mr. Rang stated that they were able to save time and resources by settling without a mediator, that phase one of the settlement agreement was implemented and requested a continuance completion of the settlement. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to March 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Continued To Jan-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Continued To Oct-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Rang for and with Nili Raviv.
Russell Rowen appeared by telephone for Natalia Raviv.

Mr. Rang stated that it is his understanding that Natalia has filed the taxes and that the creditor's issues have been addressed. Mr. Rang also stated that they have been bogged down with a buyout issue, that Natalia is planning on keeping the Dolores Street property, that the values are so far apart, asked for the petition for probate to be taken off calendar and stated that he will be filing a petition for breach of trust. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 13, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 18, 2017. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to and the Parties are to return on October 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Rang for petitioner Nili Raviv; Russell Rowen for Natalia Raviv.

Mr. Rang informed the Court that the tax returns have been filed and that the parties are working together to resolve remaining issues. He requested that the matter be continued for further discussions among the parties. Mr. Rowen concurred, and stated that a 60 day continuance would be appropriate. The matter was continued to August 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Continued To Jun-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Rang for and with Nili Raviv.
Russell Rowen for Natalia Raviv (Objector).

Mr. Rang stated that they recently discovered a safe deposit box around seven or eight days ago, that they are still waiting for the tax returns and that they want to obtain letters. Mr. Rang also stated that they have been requesting information, that the respondent's position in the small claims case is that service was incorrect, that they are unable to make any head way with any party because they can't provide documents with both parties signatures, that they can't even get the name of the tax preparer and that the respondent continues to do contracts with the deceased Father's name. Mr. Rowen objects to letters being issued stating that there is a Trust and a pour over will, and that everything has been sent to the tax preparer. The Court raised the issue of having a professional. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to agree on a professional.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To Apr-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Mar-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Rang for and with Nili Raviv.
Russell Rowen for and with Natalia Raviv (Beneficiary).

Mr. Rang stated that they filed for probate because they want to make sure tax returns are filed and creditors are flushed out, that there is one piece of property in Arizona that is not in Trust and that they have repeatedly requested that the taxes (2014 and last year) get done. Natalia stated that she filed the 2015 taxes, that she is filing 2016, that 2014 is news to her and that she is meeting with the Tax Attorney later today. Mr. Rowen objects to the petition stating that this is a poor over will and that this should be a Trust administration proceeding, that they don't need a San Francisco probate to get the property in the Trust, that they need probate in Arizona, that he just came into the case and that he will file an objection. Nili stated that her Sister has been holding things up for a very long time. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to March 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Rowen is to file his objection and Mr. Rang is to provide a list of everything that is required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Rang for and with Nili Raviv.
Natalia Raviv in Propria Persona.

Mr. Rang stated that he spoke with attorney Nadine Aarshein last week and was told that she will be representing Natalia, that he anticipates obtaining the signed documents, that most of the assets are in the Trust and that the sisters are being appointed together. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to February 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.
